title: What Sober Looks Like
description: Recurring multi-format series of honest snapshots from people 6+ months sober. Photo posts on IG, longer reflections on LinkedIn. No 'I'm so happy now' testimonialism — the unsexy parts that nobody else writes about.
hook: Nobody tells you about the ordinary days.

cta.text: What's a sober moment that surprised you?

keyMessage: Sobriety mostly feels normal — and that's the win.
angle: Lead with what surprised them, not with the dramatic transformation
